# Comp110 For All!

## The data shows a strong interest (average of 6/7) for pre-lecture videos, especially among students who feel 'Lost' (understanding score < 3). It is my recommendation to implement 5-minute 'Prep' videos for the more difficult units like Recursion. However, a tradeoff is that this increases the workload for the Professors and TAs who have to record and edit these videos.
